zh.lifeSummary: 當Lambert I von Gleichen於1098年出生在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔托納格雷分東納時，他的父親Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I29歲，母親Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra24歲。他於1123年與Mathilde von Ahr結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1149年10月3日在德國薩辛艾福特艾福特享年51歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維額爾肯洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lambert I von Gleichen于1098年出生在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔托納格雷分東納时，他的父亲Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I29岁，母亲Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra24岁。他于1123年与Mathilde von Ahr结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1149年10月3日在德国薩辛艾福特艾福特享年51岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維額爾肯洛德。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gleichen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for an iron worker who flattened out the metal into sheets, from an agent derivative of Middle High German gelīchen ‘to smooth or even out’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the inflected form of German gleich ‘same’, one of names from vocabulary words that were selected at random by government officials when surnames were made compulsory.

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lammert
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lamprecht
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

en.lifeSummary: When Lambert I von Gleichen was born in 1098, in Gräfentonna, Tonna, Gotha, Thuringia, Germany, his father, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, was 29 and his mother, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, was 24. He married Mathilde von Ahr in 1123. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 3 October 1149, in Erfurt, Erfurt, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 51, and was buried in Völkenrode, Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lambert I von Gleichen est né en 1098, à Gräfentonna, Tonna, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne, son père, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Ahr en 1123. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1149, à Erfurt, Erfurt, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Völkenrode, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lambert I von Gleichen 1098 in Gräfentonna, Tonna, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I 29 und seine Mutter Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra 24. Er hat 1123 Mathilde von Ahr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1149 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Erfurt, Erfurt, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Völkenrode, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lambert I von Gleichenが1098年にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサトナグルaフエントナで生まれた時，父Erwin von Gleichen Tonna Iは29歳，母Grafin Helenburg von Lohbraは24歳であった。1123年にMathilde von Ahrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1149年10月3日にドイツサチセンエルファートエルファートで51歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグvoルケンロドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lambert I von Gleichen(이)가 1098년 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아 토나 그a펜토나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1123년 Mathilde von Ahr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1149년 10월 3일 독일 작센 르퍼트 르퍼트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그 브o켄로드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert I von Gleichen nasceu em 1098, em Gräfentonna, Tonna, Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Ahr em 1123. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1149, em Erfurt, Erfurt, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Völkenrode, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lambert I von Gleichen родился в 1098 г. в местности грaфентонна, тонна, ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия, его отцу по имени Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Ahr в 1123 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 3 октября 1149 г. в местности эрфурт, эрфурт, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности вoлкенрод, браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

Se casó con Mathilde von Ahr en 1123. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1149, en Erfurt, Erfurt, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Völkenrode, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
